item.title: Lipedema Is Now Recognized as a Chronic Disease
item.description: International consensus defines lipedema as a chronic disease; clarifies its biology and diagnosis; and urges standardized care, research, and policy ...

item.title: When a Breast Cancer Surgeon Gets Breast Cancer
item.description: Anne Peled, MD, helped pioneer a sensation-preserving mastectomy procedure. When she got the diagnosis, she needed the procedure herself. Here’s what ...

item.title: Midwifery Graduates Face Job Drought
item.description: Nearly one in three newly qualified midwives cannot find NHS roles, despite chronic shortages across maternity services. Press Association

item.title: Rethinking Risk Communication Before Pediatric Surgery
item.description: Pediatricians should share medical, social, and medication details and prep families for safer pediatric procedures. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Cold Alerts Backed by New Mortality Data
item.description: New monitoring shows vulnerability to cold weather in England may be increasing compared with previous years. Medscape News UK
